findings.location: s1 — 処理の流れ ステップ4
findings.description: Knowledge file says「ComponentはビジネスロジックをActionに返す」but source says「Componentはビジネスロジックを実行し、結果をActionに返す」. The omission of「を実行し、結果」changes the meaning: the source says Component *executes* the business logic and returns the *results*, but the knowledge file implies it returns the business logic itself.
findings.source_evidence: d): Componentはビジネスロジックを実行し、結果をActionに返す。

findings.description: The sentence indicating that all implementation examples in the document are written based on this responsibility assignment pattern is omitted. This is useful context for AI to understand the scope and authority of this pattern.
findings.source_evidence: なお、本書に記載される業務アプリケーションの実装例は、ここで述べる責務配置を前提として記述されている。

findings.location: s1 — 業務アクションハンドラ note
findings.description: The explanation of *why* complex logic should be extracted to a business common component is omitted: that test data setup becomes complicated and work efficiency decreases. This reasoning helps AI give more informative guidance when recommending extraction.
findings.source_evidence: 複雑な内部条件をもつ業務ロジックを実装した場合、テストデータのセットアップ作業が煩雑となり、作業効率が低下する。

findings.description: The hint「ステレオタイプ」does not appear anywhere in the source text. It is derived from the filename (determining_stereotypes.rst) but has no basis in the actual source content.
findings.source_evidence: The word「ステレオタイプ」is not present anywhere in the source RST body text.
